replies.author: @davidpaine6035
replies.text: yes, and from it a little miss leading, lots of pictures from around the world but not a single picture showing any of the wonderful waterfalls,  or any of the the many small Mayan villages or the conservative Mennonite communities. Saw one small click of 1 Mayan ruin but many repeated picture of coastline that are not anywhere near Belize

comments.author: @LugaresOcultos-v4i
comments.text: Belice aún es relativamente desconocido. Creo que los países más pequeños como este suelen tener historias más interesantes que los destinos más famosos.
